using System;
using System;
using DesignPatterns.Creational;

namespace Catalog
{
    [global::System.CodeDom.Compiler.GeneratedCode("DesignPatterns.SourceGenerators", "1.0")]
    /// <summary>
    /// Provides a registry for global::Catalog.IProductFactory.
    /// </summary>
    public static partial class ProductFactoryRegistry
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Creates a new registry instance.
        /// </summary>
        public static IFactoryRegistry<string, global::Catalog.IProductFactory> Create() => new FactoryRegistryBuilder<string, global::Catalog.IProductFactory>().Register("standard", () => new global::Catalog.StandardProductFactory()).Build();
    }
}// <auto-generated />
